channel.title: Debian on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Debian on ExitCode0

item.title: Debian 10 - How to upgrade python 3.7 to python 3.9
item.description: Upgrade Python 3.7 to 3.9 on Debian 10 by compiling from source and using update-alternatives. Resolve pip and lsb_release compatibility issues after major version change.

item.title: Changing the default python version in Debian
item.description: Change default Python version in Debian from 2.7 to 3.x using update-alternatives. Set interpreter priority and switch between multiple installed Python versions.

item.title: Debian 9 - Running a python script at boot
item.description: Run a Python script automatically on Debian boot using crontab @reboot. Execute scripts with parameters, redirect output, and verify startup with journalctl logging.

item.title: Debian 9 - How to upgrade python 3.5 to python 3.7
item.description: Install Python 3.7 on Debian 9 by compiling from source, replacing 3.5 as default. Fix pip and system library issues with update-alternatives after a major upgrade.
